item.title: Latest Publication
item.description: Construction of symmetric orthogonal designs with deep Q-network and orthogonal complementary design Jianfa Lai, Linchen Weng, Xiaoling Peng & Kai-Tai Fang A variant RSA acceleration with parallelisation Jun-Jie Liu, Kang-Too Tsang & Yu-Hui Deng
